# External Snapshots

This folder stores local copies or mirrors of third-party code and format material used as supporting evidence during reverse engineering.

These are evidence layers, not the first repo entry point.

Start with:

- [Knowledge map](../../knowledge-map.md)
- [Shared TS4 Material, Texture, And UV Pipeline](../../shared-ts4-material-texture-pipeline.md)
- [References index](../README.md)

Then come here when a narrow question needs:

- code-backed corroboration from community tools
- format templates
- local samples that should remain available even without a live web lookup

## Current Snapshots

- `Binary-Templates/`
- `TS4SimRipper/`

## Usage Rule

When an external snapshot materially changes repo understanding:

1. distill the finding into a normal doc under `docs/` or `docs/references/codex-wiki/`
2. add the provenance to [Source map and trust levels](../codex-wiki/04-research-and-sources/01-source-map.md)
3. keep the snapshot here as supporting backup, not as the only place where the conclusion exists
